claims.summary: The fixed-seed projection must produce identical 8D output for the same input and epoch.
claims.disposition: verify fixed matrix initialization, repeatability, and explicit-epoch tests

claims.summary: A timestamp-derived default epoch would diverge across ephemeral runtime directories.
claims.disposition: verify the current content-derived kernel epoch, cross-directory equality, atomic persistence, and source reporting

claims.summary: The 0.85 vibrancy gate must remain C1-smooth around 0.84, 0.85, and 0.86.
claims.disposition: verify exact boundary and finite-difference smoothstep regressions

claims.summary: Changing an active projection epoch changes semantic mapping compatibility.
claims.disposition: retain epoch replacement as Tier 5 operator-reviewed compatibility work with replay, manifest, rollback, and felt-review evidence
